"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "Applications using Werkzeug to parse `multipart/form-data` requests are vulnerable to resource exhaustion. A specially crafted form body can bypass the `Request.max_form_memory_size` setting.


The `Request.max_content_length` setting, as well as resource limits provided by deployment software and platforms, are also available to limit the resources used during a request. This vulnerability does not affect those settings. All three types of limits should be considered and set appropriately when deploying an application.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01102, "percentile": 0.61853}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-10-25T19:44:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-49767"}], "nvd_published_at": "2024-10-25T20:15:04Z", "published_at": "2024-10-25T19:44:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug/security/advisories/GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2", "https://github.com/pallets/quart/commit/5e78c4169b8eb66b91ead3e62d44721b9e1644ee", "https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug/commit/50cfeebcb0727e18cc52ffbeb125f4a66551179b", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-49767", "https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug/releases/tag/3.0.6", "https://github.com/pallets/quart/commit/abb04a512496206de279225340ed022852fbf51f", "https://security.netapp.com/advisory/ntap-20250103-0007", "https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug/commit/cbb446fdcada7685fce936ded01b76c08dbd6eb5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pallets/werkzeug/security-advisories/GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pallets/werkzeug", "summary": "Werkzeug possible resource exhaustion when parsing file data in forms", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T22:24:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q34m-jh98-gwm2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.20.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "Quart"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.20.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "Werkzeug"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0rc1, <= 3.0.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Werkzeug possible resource exhaustion when parsing file data in forms
